title: Reply with exactly: explorer OK
summary_text: No blocking findings. Residual risks: - Medium: handoff no longer flows to the old generic workflow path in `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh` unless `kernel` is explicitly selected (and then only if `kernel-handoff.sh` exists/executables). A missing/corrupt `scripts/harness/kernel-handoff.sh` or manifest entry now causes hard handoff failure instead of a workflow fallback. - Medium: pipeline coverage for quoted-author/x-auto linked-system behavior was removed with the deletion path in `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml` (and related deleted workflow/tests), reducing production-risk detection for that integration path. - Low: the workflow YAML parse check now depends on `python3` + `PyYAML` in gate step (`.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml`), so CI runtime-environment drift could produce gate failures unrelated to runtime behavior.
